artworks.title: Sunrise Over the Mountains
artworks.description: A bright sunrise painted with bold strokes of orange and pink, with mountains standing tall in the background. Every color was chosen with such care and joy!

artworks.title: My Family
artworks.description: A heartwarming portrait of the whole family, complete with our dog and our house. Each person has their own special smile.

artworks.title: Underwater World
artworks.description: Colorful fish, coral reefs, and a friendly octopus — this piece imagines what it would be like to swim in the deep blue sea.

artworks.title: Rainbow Horse
artworks.description: A magical horse painted in all the colors of the rainbow, galloping through a field of flowers. Pure imagination on paper!

artworks.title: Space Adventure
artworks.description: Rockets, planets, and shooting stars fill this cosmic scene. The astronaut on the moon is waving hello to Earth.

artworks.title: Autumn Tree
artworks.description: A tall tree shedding its golden and red leaves in the autumn breeze. The texture was made by pressing leaves directly onto the paper.

artworks.title: Test Dragon
artworks.description: A test artwork entry added automatically.
